overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character first sitting at a neon-lit market stall counter, then walking through a narrow corridor and emerging into a bustling cyberpunk bazaar with industrial architecture and various NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk food stall counter with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: sitting at a market stall counter, holding and drinking from a cup while observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: vendor in orange shirt moving behind the counter, attending to tasks

entered.detail: long metal counter with various items and magazines placed on top
blue plastic cooler chest on the ground near the counter
illuminated glass display case with food items inside
metal shelving unit with various goods and equipment

segments.scene_description: The character sits at a neon-lit cyberpunk market stall counter, drinking from a cup. A vendor in an orange shirt works behind the counter in the background. The scene is static with ambient neon lighting and various stall elements like a blue cooler and food display case visible.

events.description: character stands up from the counter and begins walking forward
exits the narrow corridor and approaches the open market area

agents.ego_description: standing up and walking through a narrow passage between striped stall walls, heading toward the open market

entered.detail: zebra-striped fabric divider between market stalls
wooden counter with striped orange and yellow facade
large industrial pipes running along the ceiling and walls
metal staircase leading to an upper level

segments.scene_description: The character stands up and walks through a narrow corridor between market stalls, passing striped dividers and wooden counters. The environment transitions from the enclosed stall to a more open industrial market area with visible pipes and metal stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk market hall with industrial architecture

events.description: emerges from narrow corridor into the open market hall with industrial elements
passing by an NPC kneeling and working on mechanical equipment on the ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the open market area, observing various stalls and mechanical displays while moving past workers

notable_agents.action: mechanic kneeling on the ground, working with tools and equipment
person standing at a workbench, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: table displaying various mechanical and electronic items
mechanical prosthetic arm mounted on a stand for display
large LED panel lights hanging from the ceiling structure
red neon signs with asian characters hanging above the market
metal tool boxes and equipment cases scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character explores a wide-open cyberpunk market hall with industrial architecture, passing by a kneeling mechanic working on equipment and various stalls. The camera moves past display tables with mechanical arms and LED fixtures, while neon signs hang overhead in the bustling market atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an intimate, neon-lit stall into the expansive scale of a bustling industrial bazaar. It begins with the character sitting at a market counter drinking from a cup, with a vendor in an orange shirt working amidst blue coolers and food displays. As the character stands, the camera follows them through a narrow corridor of striped dividers and wooden counters, transitioning from the enclosed stall toward a more open environment of pipes and metal stairs. The scene then expands into a wide-open market hall characterized by industrial architecture, passing a kneeling mechanic and display tables featuring mechanical arms. Finally, the camera glides through the bustling atmosphere under hanging neon signs and LED fixtures.
